calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-27-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Daniel Bornstein, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Trinity Management Services.
Plaintiff's Witness Jacky Lopez, was placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by defendant Jerri Parling.

Exhibit 1 - Three Day Notice --------------- ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2 - Rental Agreement --------------- ID/EVID.

After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
Judgment for Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 2000 Broadway St., #413, San Francisco, CA.
The lease is forfeited.
Back Rent and Holdover Damages in the amount of $6,805.77, with Costs to be determined pursuant to submission of a memorandum of costs, for a Total Judgment in the amount of $6,805.77
Judgment signed in open court.
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibits in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-27-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-22-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on WED-OCT-22-2008: Kathryn Quetel, counsel for plaintiff Trinity Management Services; Jackie Lopez, representative, appearing on behalf of plaintiff; Jason Wolford, counsel by limited scope representation for defendant Jerri Parling, who is also present

Settlement conference is held. Case is not settled. The MON-OCT-27-2008 trial date remains.
Judge Pro Tem Roger Rubin, Clerk L. Fong, Not Reported (218)
